name: Input
description: An interactive text input component supporting sizes, visual variants, floating labels, validation states, and disabled states.

slots.label: The label describing the input value.
slots.startIcon: An optional icon rendered before the input field.
slots.endIcon: An optional icon rendered after the input field.
slots.helperText: Additional description or error message below the input field.

aria.aria-invalid: Reflects the invalid state when true.
aria.aria-describedby: Links the input to the helperText/error block.
